LanguageData.ME_NewExperimentDesc: Design an experiment by choosing three reagents. A doctor will combine them at this bench. The right combination produces an experimental compound; the wrong one wastes materials.
LanguageData.ME_RandomExperimentDesc: Automatically queue an untried experiment that can be made from ingredients you currently have. Most blind attempts produce something harmful.
LanguageData.ME_NoRandom: No untried experiment can be made from available ingredients.
LanguageData.ME_AutoExperimentDesc: While enabled, automatically queue a new untried experiment whenever the bench is idle and the reagents are available. Stops on its own when nothing new can be made.
LanguageData.ME_ComboWasDud: Tried before: produced nothing. Running it again will waste these reagents.
LanguageData.ME_ComboAttempted: Already made: you have a batch of this compound, still unidentified. Administer it before making more.
LanguageData.ME_PickHint: Choose exactly three reagents. Repeats are allowed.
LanguageData.ME_Unidentified: Unidentified experimental compound. Administer it to learn what it does.
LanguageData.ME_EffectUnknownDesc: This compound has not been identified. Administer it to a subject to learn what it does.
LanguageData.ME_AdverseReactionMsg: {0} reacted badly to {1}. Their body is incompatible with it.
LanguageData.ME_ExperimentSuccess: The experiment produced a new compound.
LanguageData.ME_ExperimentFail: The experiment failed. Salvaged {0} of 3 reagents.
LanguageData.ME_MetamorphosisNoNeedConfirm: {0} has no injuries, missing parts, or scars for Metamorphosis to heal. Administering it will still force them through a multi-day regenerative coma and a weeks-long hangover, for no benefit.\n\nAre you sure?
LanguageData.ME_SelectCompoundDesc: Choose which discovered toxic compound this unit vents at hostiles. It draws from your stockpiled compounds and consumes one dose each time it fires.
LanguageData.ME_Setting_Incompat: Incompatibility chance per patient per compound: {0}
LanguageData.ME_Setting_PrisonerExp: Enable marking prisoners for automatic experimentation
LanguageData.ME_Setting_FriendlyFire: Dispersal units affect everyone in the cloud
LanguageData.ME_Setting_FriendlyFire_Desc: Chemicals do not discriminate. Turn off to spare your own pawns.
